# programs.rbw

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.rbw`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.rbw.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rbw, a CLI Bitwarden client. |
| `programs.rbw.package` | `package` | The rbw package to use. Package providing the {command}`rbw` tool and its {command}`rbw-agent` daemon. |
| `programs.rbw.settings` | `null or (open submodule of (JSON value))` | rbw configuration, if not defined the configuration will not be managed by Home Manager. |
| `programs.rbw.settings.base_url` | `null or string` | The base-url for a self-hosted bitwarden installation. |
| `programs.rbw.settings.email` | `string` | The email address for your bitwarden account. |
| `programs.rbw.settings.identity_url` | `null or string` | The identity url for your bitwarden installation. |
| `programs.rbw.settings.lock_timeout` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | The amount of time that your login information should be cached. |
| `programs.rbw.settings.pinentry` | `null or package` | Which pinentry interface to use. Beware that `pinentry-gnome3` may not work on non-Gnome systems. You can fix it by adding the following to your system configuration: `nix services.dbus.packages = [ pkgs.gcr ]; ` |
